response.original_title: The General: Vietnam In The Age Of To Lam
response.overview: The General: Vietnam in the Age of To Lam traces the rise of Vietnam’s Communist Party chief To Lam, who cemented his position at the top of Vietnam’s leadership in the most recent 14th Party Congress. As To Lam’s power has grown, so has the expansion of Vietnam’s security apparatus that no longer stops at national borders. Asylum seekers, activists, and even insiders who challenge the system find themselves surveilled, harassed, and silenced wherever they flee.
response.title: The General: Vietnam In The Age Of To Lam
